# AI Compliance Documents
> AI compliance documentation templates for US state laws, the EU AI Act, and federal frameworks. 56 packages covering employment AI laws, consumer data privacy laws, AI governance laws, industry-specific compliance, universal governance documents, and jurisdiction-specific add-ons.

## About
AI Compliance Documents generates compliance documentation templates for businesses subject to AI regulations. Customers answer a 10-minute questionnaire about their company and AI systems, pay once (no subscription), and download customized fillable PDF documents instantly. Prices range from $49 to $997. Each package is built from the actual enacted statute text — not summaries, not training data, not paraphrases. We are not a law firm and do not provide legal advice.

## State Employment AI Laws
- [NYC Local Law 144 ($399)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/nyc-local-law-144): Bias audit + candidate notification for NYC employers using automated hiring tools
- [Illinois HB3773 ($299)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/illinois-hb3773): Employee/applicant AI notice and impact assessment for Illinois employers
- [Colorado SB 24-205 ($449)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/colorado-sb24-205): Risk management, impact assessment, and consumer notices for high-risk AI (effective June 30, 2026)
- [Multi-State Employer AI Disclosure Kit ($299)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/multi-state-employer-ai-disclosure): Combined IL + NYC + CO employer disclosure requirements in one package

## State Consumer Data Privacy Laws
- [California CCPA ADMT ($499)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/california-ccpa-admt): Automated decision-making risk assessments and consumer opt-out notices under CCPA
- [Virginia CDPA ($249)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/virginia-cdpa): Data protection assessments and privacy notices for Virginia consumer data
- [Connecticut CTDPA ($249)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/connecticut-ctdpa): Data protection assessments and profiling opt-out documentation for Connecticut
- [Oregon CPA ($249)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/oregon-cpa): Consumer privacy and AI profiling documentation for Oregon
- [Texas TDPSA ($249)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/texas-tdpsa): Data protection assessments and privacy notices for Texas consumer data
- [Texas TRAIGA (HB 149) ($299)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/texas-traiga): Texas HB 149 — the Responsible AI Governance Act — covers both developer and deployer obligations for any business that develops or deploys AI systems in Texas, built around the NIST AI 600-1 safe harbor standard (effective January 1, 2026)
- [Delaware PDPA ($249)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/delaware-pdpa): Privacy documentation for Delaware's lowest-threshold state privacy law
- [Minnesota MCDPA ($349)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/minnesota-mcdpa): Algorithmic governance documentation with AI-specific provisions
- [Montana MCDPA ($249)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/montana-mcdpa): Consumer privacy and profiling documentation for Montana
- [Indiana ICDPA ($249)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/indiana-icdpa): Consumer data privacy documentation for Indiana
- [Kentucky KCDPA ($249)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/kentucky-kcdpa): Consumer data privacy documentation for Kentucky
- [New Jersey NJDPA ($249)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/new-jersey-njdpa): Consumer data privacy documentation for New Jersey
- [Multi-State Profiling Assessment Bundle ($399)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/multi-state-profiling-assessment): Single assessment framework covering 15+ states with one document set

## Federal & International Frameworks
- [EU AI Act ($997)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/eu-ai-act): Full Annex IV technical documentation for high-risk AI systems under Regulation (EU) 2024/1689
- [EEOC AI Hiring Compliance Kit ($349)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/eeoc-ai-hiring): Title VII, ADA, and ADEA compliance documentation for AI in employment decisions
- [NIST AI RMF ($397)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/nist-ai-rmf): Implementation documents for the NIST AI Risk Management Framework (GOVERN, MAP, MEASURE, MANAGE)
- [Healthcare AI Compliance Package ($597)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/healthcare-ai-compliance): HIPAA and healthcare-specific AI governance documentation
- [Financial Services AI Compliance Package ($597)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/financial-services-ai): AI compliance documentation for financial services regulations

## Industry-Specific Packages
- [K-12 Education AI Compliance Package ($397)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/education-k12-ai): AI governance documentation for K-12 schools and districts
- [HR & Recruiting AI Compliance Bundle ($697)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/hr-recruiting-ai): Comprehensive AI compliance for HR departments using AI in recruiting and employment decisions

## Universal Governance Documents
- [AI Governance Framework ($349)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/ai-governance-framework): Foundation document establishing your organization's AI governance policies and procedures
- [AI System Registry ($199)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/ai-system-registry): Inventory of all AI tools in use — required before any state-specific compliance work
- [Employee AI Acceptable Use Policy ($199)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/employee-ai-policy): Internal policy governing how employees may use AI tools at work
- [Vendor AI Due Diligence Kit ($249)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/vendor-ai-due-diligence): Questionnaire and contract language for vetting third-party AI vendors
- [AI Bias Audit Report Template ($149)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/ai-bias-audit-template): Structured template for documenting whether AI tools produce discriminatory outcomes
- [AI Incident Response Plan ($149)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/ai-incident-response-plan): Documented plan for identifying, responding to, and reporting AI incidents
- [AI Transparency Report Template ($149)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/ai-transparency-report): Public-facing transparency report template for AI use disclosures
- [AI Whistleblower Policy ($99)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/ai-whistleblower-policy): Internal policy for reporting AI misuse or compliance violations
- [AI Acceptable Use Policy for Customers ($99)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/customer-ai-aup): Customer-facing terms governing AI use in your products and services

## Universal Add-On Packages
- [Manager Communication & Training Kit ($79)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/manager-ai-training-kit): Talking points, employee FAQ, and sign-off sheets for communicating AI policies internally
- [Annual Compliance Review Checklist ($49)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/annual-compliance-review): Structured checklist to keep compliance documents current as laws and AI tools change
- [Board & Executive AI Summary Report ($69)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/board-ai-summary): One-page status report and presentation template for board-level AI governance reporting
- [Consumer Notice Customization Kit ($49)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/consumer-notice-kit): AI disclosure notices in website, email, and physical posting formats
- [Data Mapping & Inventory Kit ($69)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/data-mapping-inventory): Personal data inventory and AI data flow diagrams — prerequisite for state privacy assessments
- [Consumer Rights Request Kit ($59)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/consumer-rights-kit): Templates for responding to consumer data rights requests under state privacy laws

## Illinois Add-Ons
- [Illinois Employee AI Notice & Response Kit ($79)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/il-notice-response-kit): Supplemental notice and response templates for Illinois HB3773
- [Illinois Zip Code Proxy Audit Workbook ($99)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/il-zip-proxy-audit): Workbook for auditing geographic proxy discrimination under Illinois law

## Colorado Add-Ons
- [Colorado Consumer Appeal & Correction Process Kit ($99)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/co-appeal-correction-kit): Consumer appeal procedures required under Colorado SB 24-205
- [Colorado Algorithmic Discrimination Discovery & AG Reporting Kit ($129)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/co-ag-reporting-kit): AG reporting documentation for algorithmic discrimination findings
- [Colorado Developer-Deployer Documentation Exchange Kit ($109)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/co-dev-deploy-exchange): Documentation exchange templates for AI developer-deployer relationships under Colorado law

## California Add-Ons
- [California ADMT Pre-Use Notice & Opt-Out Processing Kit ($99)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/ca-admt-notice-optout): Consumer opt-out processing for California ADMT regulations
- [California ADMT Access Request Response Kit ($89)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/ca-admt-access-kit): Response templates for ADMT access requests under CCPA
- [California Cybersecurity Audit & Risk Assessment Companion Kit ($149)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/ca-cyber-audit-kit): Cybersecurity audit documentation companion for California compliance

## NYC Add-Ons
- [NYC Bias Audit Management & Publication Kit ($129)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/nyc-bias-audit-mgmt): Annual bias audit management and required public summary publication templates
- [NYC Candidate/Employee Notice & Alternative Process Kit ($89)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/nyc-candidate-notice-kit): Candidate notification and alternative process documentation for NYC LL144

## Virginia Add-Ons
- [Virginia Consumer Rights Exercise & Appeal Processing Kit ($99)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/va-consumer-rights-kit): Consumer rights response and appeal procedures for Virginia CDPA
- [Virginia Profiling & AI Data Protection Assessment Workbook ($109)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/va-profiling-assessment-kit): Extended workbook for profiling risk assessments under Virginia CDPA
- [Virginia Controller-Processor Contract & Vendor Compliance Kit ($89)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/va-controller-processor-kit): Controller-processor contract templates for Virginia data processing relationships

## EU AI Act Add-Ons
- [EU AI Act Fundamental Rights Impact Assessment Kit ($149)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/eu-fria-kit): Fundamental rights impact assessment documentation for EU high-risk AI systems
- [EU AI Act Post-Market Monitoring & Serious Incident Response Kit ($139)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/eu-post-market-kit): Post-market surveillance and incident reporting templates for EU AI Act compliance
- [EU AI Act Human Oversight & Worker Notification Kit ($99)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/eu-human-oversight-kit): Human oversight design documentation and worker notification templates
- [EU AI Act Database Registration & Transparency Kit ($89)](https://aicompliancedocuments.com/products/eu-registration-transparency): EU AI database registration and transparency documentation

## Important
All documents are templates for compliance planning purposes. They do not constitute legal advice. AI Compliance Documents is not a law firm. Consult a licensed attorney to verify applicability to your specific situation.
